description: Create a 'Cloud ERP Migration Roadmap 2025' timeline diagram in Wondershare EdrawMax covering a 12-month period. The diagram must include Phase 1: Assessment & Planning (Jan 2025 – Mar 2025) with milestones 'Infrastructure Audit Complete' (Jan 31) and 'Migration Plan Approved' (Mar 15); Phase 2: Data Migration (Apr 2025 – Jun 2025) with milestones 'Data Mapping Complete' (Apr 30) and 'Test Migration Successful' (Jun 15); Phase 3: Application Migration (Jul 2025 – Sep 2025) with milestones 'Core Modules Migrated' (Aug 15) and 'Integration Testing Complete' (Sep 30); and Phase 4: Go-Live & Optimization (Oct 2025 – Dec 2025) with milestones 'Production Cutover' (Oct 15) and 'Performance Baseline Established' (Dec 15). Save the editable diagram to /home/ga/Documents/migration_timeline.eddx and export a legible image (minimum 1200px width) to /home/ga/Documents/migration_timeline.png.
